headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, while the Colorado Rockies edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, and the Tampa Bay Rays secured a 6-3 victory over the Miami Marlins.

Several players are dealing with injuries, including Los Angeles Dodgers left-handed pitcher Jack Dreyer, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder discomfort. Other players on the injured list include Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Hunter Harvey, Detroit Tigers right-handed pitcher Ty Madden, Pittsburgh Pirates right fielder Ryan O'Hearn, Cincinnati Reds catcher Jose Trevino, Toronto Blue Jays right-handed pitcher Tommy Nance, Tampa Bay Rays right fielder Jake Fraley, and San Francisco Giants left fielder Heliot Ramos.

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays in a trade for cash. The Chicago White Sox acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams and traded right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts and 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with several players making notable contributions. Xavier Edwards, Otto Lopez, and Yandy Díaz were among the impact hitters for the Marlins, while Jake Fraley was an impact hitter for the Rays.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Place LHP Jack Dreyer on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers left-handed pitcher Jack Dreyer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder discomfort. The move was made on May 17, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire LHP Eric Lauer in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer in a trade. Lauer was previously traded to the Dodgers from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash.
